creator: hamiltcl@verizon.net
text:
(In reply to Piotr Kubaj from comment #9)
I've spent the past few days building/rebuilding and have not encountered these errors.  I have no clue as to why it builds for me and not for you.  Perhaps it maybe that I'm not using any jails for my build and testing.  I have separate drives setup for builds and tests.

Your thoughts.
